name: m100-bootstrap
description: M100 Bootstrap Installer - Platform-aware installation of M100 development tools

scripts.presetup: test -n "$npm_lifecycle_event" && test "$npm_lifecycle_event" = setup || { echo 'Error: must run via npm run setup'; exit 1; }; echo 'M100 Pre-Setup: Preparing environment...'; for cmd in wget bash curl; do command -v $cmd >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "✗ Missing: $cmd (required)"; exit 1; }; done; echo '✓ wget available'; echo '✓ bash available'; echo '✓ curl available'; echo ''; if [ -d ~/.m100/tools/config ]; then backup="$HOME/.m100/tools/config.backup.$(date +%s)"; echo "Backing up existing M100 config..."; cp -r ~/.m100/tools/config "$backup" || true; echo "✓ Backup: $backup"; echo ''; fi; echo '✓ Pre-setup validation complete'
scripts.postsetup: test -n "$npm_lifecycle_event" && test "$npm_lifecycle_event" = setup || { echo 'Error: must run via npm run setup'; exit 1; }; echo ''; echo 'M100 Post-Setup: Finalizing...'; errors=0; for tool in m100-scan m100-build m100-deps; do if [ -x ~/.m100/tools/bin/$tool ]; then echo "✓ $tool installed"; else echo "✗ $tool missing"; errors=$((errors+1)); fi; done; [ -f ~/.m100/tools/config/env.sh ] && echo '✓ Configuration verified' || { echo '✗ Configuration missing'; errors=$((errors+1)); }; [ $errors -eq 0 ] || exit 1; echo ''; echo 'Installation complete. Next steps:'; echo '  1. export PATH="\$HOME/.m100/tools/bin:\$PATH"'; echo '  2. m100-scan <directory>'; echo ''; echo '✓ Setup finalized'

author: M100 Platform Team
